name: Western Union
description_short: At 1653 Basswood Blvd, Saginaw, TX 76131, you'll find Western Union's credit union location. Call +1 682-316-6386 for more information.
description_long:
Western Sun Federal Credit Union (WSFCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial cooperative headquartered in Broken Arrow, Oklahoma. The credit union has been serving its community with a mission to provide friendly, professional financial services and competitive rates on deposit and loan products. With multiple branch locations across the Oklahoma area, including Broken Arrow, Bixby, and Downtown Tulsa, WSFCU operates as a federally chartered credit union regulated by the NCUA, offering the safety of deposit insurance to its members.

WSFCU's primary product offerings include auto loans (new and used vehicles at rates as low as 5.49% APR), boat loans, certificates of deposit (CDs) paying up to 3.46% APY, money market accounts, checking accounts with cash-back rewards (3% on debit purchases up to $400 per cycle through Kasasa), savings accounts, and mortgage loans. The credit union also advertises competitive rates on various deposit products and provides online banking capabilities for member convenience. Their loan products are subject to credit approval, and the institution actively promotes financial education through news and resource materials.

WSFCU distinguishes itself through personalized member service, multiple physical branch locations with drive-through and ATM access, and specific promotional products like the Kasasa Cash Back Checking account. The credit union engages with its community through events such as shred days, car shows, and charitable donations to local schools. As a credit union rather than a bank, WSFCU operates on a member-centric cooperative model where profits are theoretically returned to members rather than shareholders, though actual member benefits vary by institution.

For consumers in the Oklahoma area seeking traditional banking and lending services, WSFCU provides legitimate alternatives to banks with credit union membership requirements. However, the organization is a regional credit union with limited geographic reach, membership eligibility requirements apply, and rates/terms advertised are promotional figures subject to credit approval and individual qualification.
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 5.49% APR for new vehicles with online application option
Kasasa Cash Back Checking offering 3% cash back on debit card purchases up to $400 per cycle
Multiple branch locations in Oklahoma with drive-through and on-site ATM access
Certificate of deposit rates up to 3.46% APY available
Federally insured credit union (NCUA) providing member deposit protection
Community engagement through financial education resources and local events
Online banking and digital service options available for members
cons: Limited geographic availability—only serves Oklahoma communities; membership requires affiliation with the field of membership
Promotional rates advertised are subject to credit approval and individual qualification; actual rates may be higher
Money market account rates are relatively low at 1.20% APY compared to online banks
Credit union membership eligibility restrictions apply; not open to all consumers
Boat loan rates at 7.64% APR are higher than auto loan rates, limiting competitiveness for certain products
best_for: Oklahoma residents seeking competitive auto loans with local branch service
Credit union members eligible for membership who want cash-back checking rewards
Consumers prioritizing relationship banking with personalized service over online-only institutions
Local community members who value financial institutions with community involvement
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best for Oklahoma-based consumers who qualify for membership and prefer traditional branch banking with competitive auto lending rates. The main caveat is that it operates as a regional credit union with membership eligibility requirements, limited geographic reach, and advertised rates require credit approval; consumers outside Oklahoma or unable to meet membership criteria should explore other options.
services: New and used auto loans (5.49% APR)
Checking accounts with Kasasa Cash Back rewards
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
